mapper.select: select c.id, c.sei, c.mei, c.mail, c.tel, c.address1, c.address2, c.address3, c.address4 from customer c inner join login l on c.id = l.id where c.mail = #{mail} and l.password = #{password} and c.is_deleted = false and l.is_deleted = false
SELECT c.ID, c.SEI, c.MEI, c.MAIL FROM customer c WHERE c.ID = #{id} AND c.is_deleted = false
